parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Allowed: id, purchase_invoice_date, due_date, other_date, supplier_invoice_number, status, purchase_order_id, supplier_id, created_at, updated_at, purchase_order_number, supplier_name, line_item_count

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by invoice status (open, partial, paid, etc.)

parameters.name: filter[supplier_invoice_number]
parameters.description: Filter by supplier invoice number (text match)

parameters.name: filter[purchase_order_id]
parameters.description: Filter by purchase order ID (exact match)

parameters.name: filter[purchase_order_number]
parameters.description: Filter by purchase order number (text match)

parameters.name: filter[archived]
parameters.description: archived filter: omit for non-archived only, 'only' for archived only, 'all' for all records

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search across supplier_invoice_number, id, supplier name, purchase_order_number
